{{CargoRelic
|name=Economic Table
|class_id=22615
|rank=SS
|affct=FAME
|birthday=09-21
|source=
|description=On Sept 21, 1758 AD, Quesnay's Economic Table was first published.<br>The Economic Table is a work by Fran?ois Quesnay, the founder of the physiocratic school of economics, which summarizes his economic theories. The work is divided into three versions: the original, the summary, and the graphical, each of which underwent extensive improvement and revision, reaching maturity in the graphical stage. Through charts and tables, Quesnay demonstrated the objective process of production and reproduction in capitalist society and attempted to reveal its laws. As a result, the Tableau économique became the first work in the history of economics to systematically study this process, establishing Quesnay's position in the history of economics.
|fame=103
|art=57
|fth=53
|civ=64
|tech=70
|ss1=Snail ATK +10<br>Snail DEF +10<br>Snail RUSH +10
|ss2=Snail ATK +20<br>Snail DEF +20<br>Snail RUSH +20
|ss3=Snail ATK +30<br>Snail DEF +30<br>Snail RUSH +30
|ss4=Snail ATK +50<br>Snail DEF +50<br>Snail RUSH +50
|ss5=Snail ATK +70<br>Snail DEF +70<br>Snail RUSH +70
|ss6=Snail ATK +100<br>Snail DEF +100<br>Snail RUSH +100
|ss7=Snail ATK +100<br>Snail DEF +100<br>Snail RUSH +100<br>Snail HP +1000 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Skill skill III.png|50px]]??? (Coming soon)
|skill2=[[File:Skill skill III.png|50px]]??? (Coming soon)
|skill3=[[File:Skill skill III.png|50px]]??? (Coming soon)
|mirage={{Mirage|name=Physiocracy|reward={{RewardIconWithLink|W-tadpole, +1000|orange}}
|3name=DuPont|3rec=145.99M|3atk=399790|3defense=249300|3hp=24369825|3weak=38701
|4name=Turgot|4rec=272.99M|4atk=679320|4defense=408158|4hp=69631574|4weak=50830
|5name=Quesnay|5rec=451.39M|5atk=976013|5defense=568660|5hp=140505301|5weak=57972
|Arec=701.26M|Aatk=1421142|Adefense=801608|Ahp=357510498|Aweak=70610
}}}}
